title: PingCC
description: This mod brings Valorant Ping-tap system to Minecraft.
body:
## Information
This mod brings **Valorant** Ping-tap system to Minecraft (and all agents' voice lines when pinging).

This mod is a fork of [MCPings](https://github.com/Dyvinia/MCPings), which is a fork of [PingWheel](https://github.com/LukenSkyne/Minecraft-Ping-Wheel).

### Ping a block

![Pinging block](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/X5Rji32N/images/3d78aace16664a402a6359d0da32226171df9afc.png)

### Ping an entity

![Pinging entity](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/X5Rji32N/images/602ffba714d4fafed73b22a5928f1ba1806bceee.png)

### Configuration

![Config](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/X5Rji32N/images/2db3452947bae7df6046fe170a2716e2b9a6920f.png)

## Disclaimer
* All the sounds are from FandomWiki of each agent.
